metadata.description: Typecast TTS API integration skills and tools for Claude Code. Includes API expert agent, code samples, and troubleshooting guides.

plugins.name: typecast-api-expert
plugins.description: Typecast TTS API expert agent. Provides API key setup, code samples (Python, JavaScript, cURL), error troubleshooting, and plan comparison. Use for 'Typecast API', 'TTS integration', 'text-to-speech API' questions.
